reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención de los playeros. Se forman colas y no organizan en lo más mínimo nada.
Según dicen solo despachan combustible, aún si se cuelan en la cola.
Hasta se divierten con la situación.
Mala, muy mala imagen.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas stations is terrible. Lines form and they don't organize anything at all.
They say they only pump fuel, even if people cut in line.
They even seem to enjoy the situation. A very, very bad impression.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbDV5RWpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen me mucha tranquilidad para atender y el shop tienen los precios colo en un almacén de barrio con cartelitos muy simpáticos a mano.

(Translated by Google)
They are very calm when serving me and the shop has prices set at a neighborhood store with very nice signs at hand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteDRqQ1JREAE

reviews.comment:
Estando en el sur en ese momento no tenían ningún tipo de nafta o diésel y en vez de decirnos dónde podría llegar a haber otra estación de servicio nos ignoraban

(Translated by Google)
Being in the south at that time, they didn't have any type of gasoline or diesel and instead of telling us where there might be another service station, they ignored us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtLTcyVk5BEAE
